
```{r}
library(algatr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
source(here("general_functions.R"))
```
```{r}
load_algatr_example()
#path <- here("58-Sceloporus", "58-Sceloporus_maf05_minDP5_maxDP50_rmsamp60_mm80_rmsamp20_r60.vcf.gz")
path <- here("58-Sceloporus", "QC", "58-Sceloporus.pruned.vcf.gz")
vcf <- vcfR::read.vcfR(path)
dos <- vcf_to_dosage(vcf)
dos_imp <- simple_impute(dos)

coords <- get_coords() %>% filter(SampleID %in% row.names(dos_imp))
env <- extract(CA_env, coords[,c("x", "y")])

rda <- rda_run(dos_imp, coords = coords[, c("x", "y")], env = env, model = "full")
rda_sig_p <- rda_getoutliers(rda, naxes = "all", outlier_method = "p", p_adj = "fdr", sig = 0.05, plot = FALSE)

rda_plot(rda, rda_sig_p$rda_snps, rda_sig_p$pvalues, rdaplot = FALSE, manhattan = TRUE)

  
chrom <- vcf@fix[,1]
chrom_numbering <- 
  data.frame(chrom = vcf@fix[,1]) %>%
  group_by(chrom) %>%
  count() %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(chromn = 1:nrow(.)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-n)

df <- 
  data.frame(chrom = chrom, p = rda_sig_p$pvalues, pos = 1:length(rda_sig_p$pvalues)) %>%
  mutate(outlier = case_when(p < 0.05 ~ TRUE, .default = FALSE)) %>%
  mutate(neglogp = -log(p)) %>%
  left_join(chrom_numbering)

axis_set <- 
  df %>%
  group_by(chromn) %>%
  summarize(center = mean(pos))

ggplot(filter(df, chromn %in% 1:5)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = (pos), y = neglogp, col = as.factor(chromn)), cex = 0.5) +
  #facet_wrap(~chrom, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1, strip.position = "bottom") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = -log(0.05)), col = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values = rep(c("#38a197", "#1d5650"), nrow(df))) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("-log(p)") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    label = axis_set$chromn,
    breaks = axis_set$center
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(), strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), legend.position = 1)



ggplot(df) +
  geom_point(aes(x = (pos), y = neglogp, col = as.factor(chromn)), cex = 0.5) +
  #facet_wrap(~chrom, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1, strip.position = "bottom") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = -log(0.05)), col = "black", linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values = rep(c("#38a197", "#1d5650"), nrow(df))) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("-log(p)") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(label = axis_set$chromn, breaks = axis_set$center,expand = c(0,0)) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(), strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), legend.position = 1, axis.text.x = element_blank())
```
